overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person driving through Night City during a heavy rainstorm at dusk. The player navigates through multi-lane highways, complex overpass interchanges, and neon-lit urban streets with moderate traffic and occasional pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city highway with neon commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: driving straight on wet highway following a vehicle ahead, maintaining steady speed through light rain

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with continuous green neon strip lighting along the facade
metal gantry with illuminated directional signs spanning across the road
large corporate signage reading ELECTRIC CORPORATION on building facade

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway during a heavy rainstorm, with a distinctive neon-lit building on the right and overhead highway signs visible in the distance. The road is wet with visible reflections, and the vehicle follows traffic ahead through the dystopian cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete overpasses and ramps

events.description: driving under first massive concrete overpass structure entering complex highway interchange
merging with traffic from right ramp while navigating through overpass corridors

agents.ego_description: navigating through the highway interchange, merging with other vehicles while passing under multiple overpass levels

notable_agents.action: white sedan merging from the right ramp into the main highway flow

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars creating covered corridors
large illuminated billboard with red white and blue graphics displaying GIRL X
tall concrete walls lining the highway to block noise

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a complex highway interchange with massive concrete overpasses creating a semi-covered corridor. The famous GIRL X billboard appears on the right as the vehicle merges with moderate traffic, passing under multiple levels of highway infrastructure while rain continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street exit ramp transitioning to commercial district with pedestrian shelters

events.description: exiting highway onto urban street level with visible pedestrians and storefronts
slowing for intersection with traffic lights and pedestrian crossing

agents.ego_description: exiting the highway ramp and entering urban street level, navigating through areas with pedestrian activity and commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking along the sidewalk under the shelter awning

entered.detail: covered walkway with transparent roof sheltering pedestrians from the heavy rain
commercial buildings with illuminated signs and glass windows at street level
suspended traffic signals with red and green lights over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Exiting the highway onto street level, the environment opens to reveal pedestrian shelters and commercial storefronts. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sheltered sidewalks, and the vehicle slows for traffic lights at the intersection, transitioning from the isolated highway to the bustling urban street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban commercial street with intersections, storefronts, and pedestrian crossings

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at busy intersection with crosswalks
accelerating through intersection as traffic light turns green

agents.ego_description: navigating through urban intersections with traffic controls, stopping at red lights and proceeding on green through moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity

notable_agents.action: red sports car waiting at the intersection traffic light

entered.detail: electronic billboard displays with changing advertisements on building facades
multi-story commercial buildings with various neon signage and architectural details

segments.scene_description: Driving through the heart of the commercial district, the vehicle stops at red traffic lights surrounded by neon-lit buildings and digital billboards. Pedestrians with umbrellas cross at intersections, and other vehicles wait alongside. The scene accelerates as the light turns green, continuing through the rain-soaked urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway bridge with guardrails and distant city views

events.description: entering highway on-ramp leaving urban street level for elevated bridge
accelerating to highway speed on the elevated bridge structure

agents.ego_description: merging onto the highway bridge ramp and accelerating along the elevated roadway leaving the dense urban area behind

entered.detail: elevated roadway with metal guardrails and concrete support columns spanning across the city
tall light poles with multiple lamps lining both sides of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters an on-ramp and transitions onto an elevated highway bridge, leaving the street-level commercial district behind. The scene opens to a wider view with guardrails lining the sides and overhead lights illuminating the wet road. The vehicle accelerates to highway speed as it crosses the bridge structure through the continuing rainstorm.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked dystopian city, transitioning from a high-speed highway into the dense urban street level. It begins on a multi-lane highway amidst a heavy rainstorm, where the vehicle follows traffic past a neon-lit building and distant overhead signs. As the road curves, the scene shifts into a complex interchange of massive concrete overpasses that create a semi-covered corridor, passing the prominent GIRL X billboard while merging with other vehicles. The environment then opens up as the vehicle exits the highway infrastructure and descends toward the city floor. Finally, the perspective slows at a traffic intersection, moving from the isolated scale of the overpasses to a bustling street lined with commercial storefronts and pedestrians with umbrellas.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from the dense, neon-lit commercial district onto an expansive elevated highway. It begins at a standstill at a red traffic light, surrounded by towering digital billboards and pedestrians with umbrellas crossing the rain-soaked streets. As the light turns green, the vehicle accelerates through the urban corridor before smoothly transitioning onto an on-ramp. The scene then opens and expands as the camera leaves the street-level congestion behind, ascending onto a wide bridge structure lined with guardrails. Finally, the view widens under the glow of overhead lights as the vehicle reaches highway speeds, cutting through the persistent rainstorm.
